Root Route\n- **Route Path:** `/`\n- **Function Name:** `root_redirect`\n- **HTTP Method:** GET\n- **Template Rendered:** Redirect to `/dashboard`\n- **Context Variables:** None\n- **Notes:** Redirects to the Dashboard page.\n\n\n### 2. Dashboard Page\n- **Route Path:** `/dashboard`\n- **Function Name:** `dashboard`\n- **HTTP Method:** GET\n- **Template Rendered:** `dashboard.html`\n- **Context Variables:**\n  - `featured_books` (list of dict): List of featured book data dictionaries.\n  - `bestsellers` (list of dict): List of bestseller books data dictionaries.\n- **Form Handling:** None (buttons navigate via GET requests).\n\n\n### 3. Book Catalog Page\n- **Route Path:** `/catalog`\n- **Function Name:** `book_catalog`\n- **HTTP Method:** GET\n- **Template Rendered:** `catalog.html`\n- **Context Variables:**\n  - `books` (list of dict): List of books matching any search/filter criteria.\n  - `categories` (list of dict): List of category dictionaries for filter dropdown.\n  - `selected_category` (str): Currently selected category filter value.\n  - `search_query` (str): Current search input value.\n- **Form Handling:** Search and filter are handled as GET query parameters.\n\n\n### 4. Book Details Page\n- **Route Path:** `/book/<int:book_id>`\n- **Function Name:** `book_details`\n- **HTTP Method:** GET\n- **Template Rendered:** `book_details.html`\n- **Context Variables:**\n  - `book` (dict): Full detail of the selected book.\n  - `reviews` (list of dict): List of reviews related to this book.\n- **Form Handling:** None on GET.\n\n- **Route Path (Add to Cart POST):** `/book/<int:book_id>/add_to_cart`\n- **Function Name:** `add_to_cart`\n- **HTTP Method:** POST\n- **Template Rendered:** Redirect back to the book details page.\n- **Form Handling:** Handles submission of add-to-cart action. Receives quantity (optional, assumed 1 if not specified).\n\n\n### 5. Shopping Cart Page\n- **Route Path:** `/cart`\n- **Function Name:** `cart`\n- **HTTP Method:** GET\n- **Template Rendered:** `cart.html`\n- **Context Variables:**\n  - `cart_items` (list of dict): Each dict includes cart item details such as book info and quantity.\n  - `total_amount` (float): Total price of all cart items.\n- **Form Handling:** None on GET.\n\n- **Route Path (Update Quantity POST):** `/cart/update_quantity/<int:item_id>`\n- **Function Name:** `update_quantity`\n- **HTTP Method:** POST\n- **Template Rendered:** Redirect to `/cart`\n- **Form Handling:** Handles submission of updated quantity for a cart item.\n\n- **Route Path (Remove Item POST):** `/cart/remove_item/<int:item_id>`\n- **Function Name:** `remove_item`\n- **HTTP Method:** POST\n- **Template Rendered:** Redirect to `/cart`\n- **Form Handling:** Handles removal of an item from the cart.\n\n- **Route Path (Proceed to Checkout GET):** `/checkout`\n- **Function Name:** `checkout`\n- **HTTP Method:** GET\n- **Template Rendered:** `checkout.html`\n- **Context Variables:** None\n\n\n### 6. Checkout Page\n- **Route Path (GET):** `/checkout`\n- **Function Name:** `checkout`\n- **HTTP Method:** GET\n- **Template Rendered:** `checkout.html`\n- **Context Variables:** None\n\n- **Route Path (POST place order):** `/checkout/place_order`\n- **Function Name:** `place_order`\n- **HTTP Method:** POST\n- **Template Rendered:** Redirect to `/orders`\n- **Form Handling:** Receives customer name, shipping address, selected payment method. Processes order creation, clears cart.\n\n\n### 7. Order History Page\n- **Route Path:** `/orders`\n- **Function Name:** `order_history`\n- **HTTP Method:** GET\n- **Template Rendered:** `orders.html`\n- **Context Variables:**\n  - `orders` (list of dict): List of orders with order ID, date, total amount, and status.\n  - `status_filter` (str): Current status filter (All, Pending, Shipped, Delivered).\n- **Form Handling:** Status filter applied via GET query parameter.\n\n- **Route Path (View Order Details GET):** `/orders/<int:order_id>`\n- **Function Name:** `view_order`\n- **HTTP Method:** GET\n- **Template Rendered:** `order_details.html` (Assuming needed but user task does not specify page. Included for order detail view logic.)\n- **Context Variables:**\n  - `order` (dict): Details of the selected order.\n  - `order_items` (list of dict): List of items associated with order.\n- **Form Handling:** None\n\n\n### 8. Reviews Page\n- **Route Path:** `/reviews`\n- **Function Name:** `reviews_page`\n- **HTTP Method:** GET\n- **Template Rendered:** `reviews.html`\n- **Context Variables:**\n  - `reviews` (list of dict): List of reviews.\n  - `rating_filter` (str): Current rating filter (All, 5 stars, 4 stars, etc.).\n- **Form Handling:** Filter applied via GET query parameter.\n\n\n### 9. Write Review Page\n- **Route Path (GET):** `/write_review`\n- **Function Name:** `write_review_page`\n- **HTTP Method:** GET\n- **Template Rendered:** `write_review.html`\n- **Context Variables:**\n  - `books` (list of dict): List of books eligible for review (typically purchased).\n\n- **Route Path (POST submit review):** `/write_review/submit`\n- **Function Name:** `submit_review`\n- **HTTP Method:** POST\n- **Template Rendered:** Redirect to `/reviews`\n- **Form Handling:** Accepts book selection, rating (1-5), review text. Creates new review record.\n\n\n### 10. Bestsellers Page\n- **Route Path:** `/bestsellers`\n- **Function Name:** `bestsellers_page`\n- **HTTP Method:** GET\n- **Template Rendered:** `bestsellers.html`\n- **Context Variables:**\n  - `bestsellers` (list of dict): List of bestsellers ranked with book info and sales count.\n  - `time_period` (str): Selected time period filter (This Week, This Month, All Time).\n- **Form Handling:** Time period filter as GET query parameter.\n\n---\n\n## Section 2: HTML Templates Specification\n\n### Template 1: Dashboard Page\n- **File Path:** `templates/dashboard.html`\n- **Page Title:** Bookstore Dashboard\n- **Main H1 Heading:** Bookstore Dashboard\n- **Element IDs:**\n  - `dashboard-page` (Div) - Container for the dashboard page\n  - `featured-books` (Div) - Display featured book recommendations\n  - `browse-catalog-button` (Button) - Navigates to `/catalog`\n  - `view-cart-button` (Button) - Navigates to `/cart`\n  - `bestsellers-button` (Button) - Navigates to `/bestsellers`\n- **Context Variables:**\n  - `featured_books` (list of dict)\n  - `bestsellers` (list of dict)\n- **Navigation Mappings:**\n  - `browse-catalog-button` -> url_for('book_catalog')\n  - `view-cart-button` -> url_for('cart')\n  - `bestsellers-button` -> url_for('bestsellers_page')\n\n\n### Template 2: Book Catalog Page\n- **File Path:** `templates/catalog.html`\n- **Page Title:** Book Catalog\n- **Main H1 Heading:** Book Catalog\n- **Element IDs:**\n  - `catalog-page` (Div) - Container for the catalog page\n  - `search-input` (Input) - Search field for filtering books by title, author, ISBN\n  - `category-filter` (Dropdown) - Filter dropdown for categories\n  - `books-grid` (Div) - Grid container for book cards\n  - `view-book-button-{book_id}` (Button) - Button to view book details, one per book\n- **Context Variables:**\n  - `books` (list of dict)\n  - `categories` (list of dict)\n  - `selected_category` (str)\n  - `search_query` (str)\n- **Navigation Mappings:**\n  - `view-book-button-{book_id}` -> url_for('book_details', book_id=book_id)\n\n\n### Template 3: Book Details Page\n- **File Path:** `templates/book_details.html`\n- **Page Title:** Book Details\n- **Main H1 Heading:** Book Details\n- **Element IDs:**\n  - `book-details-page` (Div) - Container for the page\n  - `book-title` (H1) - Displays book title\n  - `book-author` (Div) - Displays book author\n  - `book-price` (Div) - Displays book price\n  - `add-to-cart-button` (Button) - Button to add current book to cart\n  - `book-reviews` (Div) - Section displaying customer reviews\n- **Context Variables:**\n  - `book` (dict)\n  - `reviews` (list of dict)\n- **Form Structure:**\n  - POST form to `/book/<book_id>/add_to_cart`\n  - Quantity input hidden or fixed as 1 (not specified, assume 1)\n  - Submit button id: `add-to-cart-button`\n\n\n### Template 4: Shopping Cart Page\n- **File Path:** `templates/cart.html`\n- **Page Title:** Shopping Cart\n- **Main H1 Heading:** Shopping Cart\n- **Element IDs:**\n  - `cart-page` (Div) - Container\n  - `cart-items-table` (Table) - Table listing cart items\n  - `update-quantity-{item_id}` (Input number) - Input field for item quantity updates\n  - `remove-item-button-{item_id}` (Button) - Button to remove cart item\n  - `proceed-checkout-button` (Button) - Button to navigate to checkout\n  - `total-amount` (Div) - Displays total cart amount\n- **Context Variables:**\n  - `cart_items` (list of dict)\n  - `total_amount` (float)\n- **Navigation Mappings:**\n  - `proceed-checkout-button` -> url_for('checkout')\n- **Form Structure:**\n  - Form(s) for quantity update and item removal each with POST method\n\n\n### Template 5: Checkout Page\n- **File Path:** `templates/checkout.html`\n- **Page Title:** Checkout\n- **Main H1 Heading:** Checkout\n- **Element IDs:**\n  - `checkout-page` (Div) - Container\n  - `customer-name` (Input) - Customer name input field\n  - `shipping-address` (Textarea) - Shipping address input field\n  - `payment-method` (Dropdown) - Dropdown for selecting payment method\n  - `place-order-button` (Button) - Submit button to place order\n- **Context Variables:** None\n- **Form Structure:**\n  - POST form to `/checkout/place_order`\n  - Fields: customer-name, shipping-address, payment-method\n  - Submit button id: `place-order-button`\n\n\n### Template 6: Order History Page\n- **File Path:** `templates/orders.html`\n- **Page Title:** Order History\n- **Main H1 Heading:** Order History\n- **Element IDs:**\n  - `orders-page` (Div) - Container\n  - `orders-table` (Table) - Displays orders list\n  - `view-order-button-{order_id}` (Button) - Button to view order details\n  - `order-status-filter` (Dropdown) - Dropdown for status filtering\n  - `back-to-dashboard` (Button) - Button to return to dashboard\n- **Context Variables:**\n  - `orders` (list of dict)\n  - `status_filter` (str)\n- **Navigation Mappings:**\n  - `view-order-button-{order_id}` -> url_for('view_order', order_id=order_id)\n  - `back-to-dashboard` -> url_for('dashboard')\n\n\n### Template 7: Reviews Page\n- **File Path:** `templates/reviews.html`\n- **Page Title:** Customer Reviews\n- **Main H1 Heading:** Customer Reviews\n- **Element IDs:**\n  - `reviews-page` (Div) - Container\n  - `reviews-list` (Div) - List of reviews\n  - `write-review-button` (Button) - Button to navigate to write review page\n  - `filter-by-rating` (Dropdown) - Dropdown to filter reviews by rating\n  - `back-to-dashboard` (Button) - Button to return to dashboard\n- **Context Variables:**\n  - `reviews` (list of dict)\n  - `rating_filter` (str)\n- **Navigation Mappings:**\n  - `write-review-button` -> url_for('write_review_page')\n  - `back-to-dashboard` -> url_for('dashboard')\n\n\n### Template 8: Write Review Page\n- **File Path:** `templates/write_review.html`\n- **Page Title:** Write a Review\n- **Main H1 Heading:** Write a Review\n- **Element IDs:**\n  - `write-review-page` (Div) - Container\n  - `select-book` (Dropdown) - Book selection dropdown\n  - `rating-select` (Dropdown) - Rating selection dropdown (1-5 stars)\n  - `review-text` (Textarea) - Input area for review text\n  - `submit-review-button` (Button) - Submit button\n- **Context Variables:**\n  - `books` (list of dict)\n- **Form Structure:**\n  - POST form to `/write_review/submit`\n  - Fields: select-book, rating-select, review-text\n  - Submit button id: `submit-review-button`\n\n\n### Template 9: Bestsellers Page\n- **File Path:** `templates/bestsellers.html`\n- **Page Title:** Bestsellers\n- **Main H1 Heading:** Bestsellers\n- **Element IDs:**\n  - `bestsellers-page` (Div) - Container\n  - `bestsellers-list` (Div) - Ranked list of bestsellers\n  - `time-period-filter` (Dropdown) - Filter dropdown for time periods\n  - `view-book-button-{book_id}` (Button) - Button to view book details per bestseller\n  - `back-to-dashboard` (Button) - Button to return to dashboard\n- **Context Variables:**\n  - `bestsellers` (list of dict)\n  - `time_period` (str)\n- **Navigation Mappings:**\n  - `view-book-button-{book_id}` -> url_for('book_details', book_id=book_id)\n  - `back-to-dashboard` -> url_for('dashboard')\n\n---\n\n## Section 3: Data Schemas Specification\n\n### 1. Books Data\n- **File Path:** `data/books.txt`\n- **Format:** Pipe-delimited (`|`)\n- **Fields Order:**\n  1. `book_id` (int)\n  2. `title` (str)\n  3. `author` (str)\n  4. `isbn` (str)\n  5. `category` (str)\n  6. `price` (float)\n  7. `stock` (int)\n  8. `description` (str)\n- **Description:** Stores all book information.\n- **Example Rows:**\n  ```\n  1|The Great Gatsby|F. Scott Fitzgerald|9780743273565|Fiction|12.99|50|A classic American novel\n  2|Sapiens|Yuval Noah Harari|9780062316097|Non-Fiction|16.99|30|A brief history of humankind\n  3|1984|George Orwell|9780451524935|Fiction|14.99|45|Dystopian social science fiction\n  ```\n\n\n### 2. Categories Data\n- **File Path:** `data/categories.txt`\n- **Format:** Pipe-delimited (`|`)\n- **Fields Order:**\n  1. `category_id` (int)\n  2. `category_name` (str)\n  3. `description` (str)\n- **Description:** Stores book category information.\n- **Example Rows:**\n  ```\n  1|Fiction|Fictional narratives and novels\n  2|Non-Fiction|Factual and educational books\n  3|Science|Scientific topics and research\n  ```\n\n\n### 3. Cart Data\n- **File Path:** `data/cart.txt`\n- **Format:** Pipe-delimited (`|`)\n- **Fields Order:**\n  1. `cart_id` (int)\n  2. `book_id` (int)\n  3. `quantity` (int)\n  4. `added_date` (str, format `YYYY-MM-DD`)\n- **Description:** Stores shopping cart items.\n- **Example Rows:**\n  ```\n  1|1|2|2025-01-15\n  2|3|1|2025-01-16\n  ```\n\n\n### 4. Orders Data\n- **File Path:** `data/orders.txt`\n- **Format:** Pipe-delimited (`|`)\n- **Fields Order:**\n  1. `order_id` (int)\n  2. `customer_name` (str)\n  3. `order_date` (str, format `YYYY-MM-DD`)\n  4. `total_amount` (float)\n  5. `status` (str)\n  6. `shipping_address` (str)\n- **Description:** Stores customer orders with tracking status.\n- **Example Rows:**\n  ```\n  1|John Doe|2025-01-10|38.97|Delivered|123 Main St, New York, NY 10001\n  2|Jane Smith|2025-01-14|16.99|Shipped|456 Oak Ave, Los Angeles, CA 90001\n  ```\n\n\n### 5. Order Items Data\n- **File Path:** `data/order_items.txt`\n- **Format:** Pipe-delimited (`|`)\n- **Fields Order:**\n  1. `order_item_id` (int)\n  2. `order_id` (int)\n  3. `book_id` (int)\n  4. `quantity` (int)\n  5. `price` (float)\n- **Description:** Stores individual items within each order.\n- **Example Rows:**\n  ```\n  1|1|1|2|12.99\n  2|1|3|1|14.99\n  3|2|2|1|16.99\n  ```\n\n\n### 6. Reviews Data\n- **File Path:** `data/reviews.txt`\n- **Format:** Pipe-delimited (`|`)\n- **Fields Order:**\n  1. `review_id` (int)\n  2. `book_id` (int)\n  3. `customer_name` (str)\n  4. `rating` (int, 1-5)\n  5. `review_text` (str)\n  6. `review_date` (str, format `YYYY-MM-DD`)\n- **Description:** Stores customer reviews for books.\n- **Example Rows:**\n  ```\n  1|1|Alice Johnson|5|Amazing book! A true classic.|2025-01-12\n  2|2|Bob Williams|4|Very informative and well-written.|2025-01-13\n  3|3|Charlie Brown|5|Thought-provoking and relevant today.|2025-01-15\n  ```\n\n\n### 7. Bestsellers Data\n- **File Path:** `data/bestsellers.txt`\n- **Format:** Pipe-delimited (`|`)\n- **Fields Order:**\n  1. `book_id` (int)\n  2. `sales_count` (int)\n  3. `period` (str) - Time period (e.g., This Week, This Month, All Time)\n- **Description:** Stores bestseller rankings by sales count and period.\n- **Example Rows:**\n  ```\n  2|150|This Month\n  1|120|This Month\n  3|95|This Month\n  ```\n\n---\n\n**End of Design Specification Document**\n"})

# Requirements Document for 'BookstoreOnline' Web Application

## 1. Objective
Develop a comprehensive web application named 'BookstoreOnline' using Python, with data managed through local text files. The application enables users to browse books, add items to cart, checkout, write reviews, and track order history. No authentication required - all features are directly accessible. Note that the website should start from the Dashboard page.

## 2. Language
The required development language for the 'BookstoreOnline' application is Python.

## 3. Page Design

The 'BookstoreOnline' web application will consist of the following nine pages:

### 1. Dashboard Page
- **Page Title**: Bookstore Dashboard
- **Overview**: The main hub displaying featured books, bestsellers, and quick navigation to all functionalities.
- **Elements**:
  - **ID: dashboard-page** - Type: Div - Container for the dashboard page.
  - **ID: featured-books** - Type: Div - Display of featured book recommendations.
  - **ID: browse-catalog-button** - Type: Button - Button to navigate to book catalog page.
  - **ID: view-cart-button** - Type: Button - Button to navigate to shopping cart page.
  - **ID: bestsellers-button** - Type: Button - Button to navigate to bestsellers page.

### 2. Book Catalog Page
- **Page Title**: Book Catalog
- **Overview**: A page displaying all available books with search and filter capabilities.
- **Elements**:
  - **ID: catalog-page** - Type: Div - Container for the catalog page.
  - **ID: search-input** - Type: Input - Field to search books by title, author, or ISBN.
  - **ID: category-filter** - Type: Dropdown - Dropdown to filter by category (Fiction, Non-Fiction, Science, History, etc.).
  - **ID: books-grid** - Type: Div - Grid displaying book cards with cover, title, author, and price.
  - **ID: view-book-button-{book_id}** - Type: Button - Button to view book details (each book card has this).

### 3. Book Details Page
- **Page Title**: Book Details
- **Overview**: A page displaying detailed information about a specific book.
- **Elements**:
  - **ID: book-details-page** - Type: Div - Container for the book details page.
  - **ID: book-title** - Type: H1 - Display book title.
  - **ID: book-author** - Type: Div - Display book author.
  - **ID: book-price** - Type: Div - Display book price.
  - **ID: add-to-cart-button** - Type: Button - Button to add book to shopping cart.
  - **ID: book-reviews** - Type: Div - Section displaying customer reviews.

### 4. Shopping Cart Page
- **Page Title**: Shopping Cart
- **Overview**: A page displaying items in the cart with quantity management and checkout option.
- **Elements**:
  - **ID: cart-page** - Type: Div - Container for the cart page.
  - **ID: cart-items-table** - Type: Table - Table displaying cart items with title, quantity, price, and subtotal.
  - **ID: update-quantity-{item_id}** - Type: Input (number) - Field to update item quantity (each cart item has this).
  - **ID: remove-item-button-{item_id}** - Type: Button - Button to remove item from cart (each cart item has this).
  - **ID: proceed-checkout-button** - Type: Button - Button to proceed to checkout.
  - **ID: total-amount** - Type: Div - Display total cart amount.

### 5. Checkout Page
- **Page Title**: Checkout
- **Overview**: A page for users to enter shipping information and complete purchase.
- **Elements**:
  - **ID: checkout-page** - Type: Div - Container for the checkout page.
  - **ID: customer-name** - Type: Input - Field to input customer name.
  - **ID: shipping-address** - Type: Textarea - Field to input shipping address.
  - **ID: payment-method** - Type: Dropdown - Dropdown to select payment method (Credit Card, PayPal, Bank Transfer).
  - **ID: place-order-button** - Type: Button - Button to confirm and place order.

### 6. Order History Page
- **Page Title**: Order History
- **Overview**: A page displaying all previous orders with tracking information.
- **Elements**:
  - **ID: orders-page** - Type: Div - Container for the orders page.
  - **ID: orders-table** - Type: Table - Table displaying orders with order ID, date, total amount, and status.
  - **ID: view-order-button-{order_id}** - Type: Button - Button to view order details (each order has this).
  - **ID: order-status-filter** - Type: Dropdown - Dropdown to filter by status (All, Pending, Shipped, Delivered).
  - **ID: back-to-dashboard** - Type: Button - Button to navigate back to dashboard.

### 7. Reviews Page
- **Page Title**: Customer Reviews
- **Overview**: A page displaying all customer reviews and allowing users to write new reviews.
- **Elements**:
  - **ID: reviews-page** - Type: Div - Container for the reviews page.
  - **ID: reviews-list** - Type: Div - List of all reviews with book title, rating, and review text.
  - **ID: write-review-button** - Type: Button - Button to navigate to write review page.
  - **ID: filter-by-rating** - Type: Dropdown - Dropdown to filter reviews by rating (All, 5 stars, 4 stars, etc.).
  - **ID: back-to-dashboard** - Type: Button - Button to navigate back to dashboard.

### 8. Write Review Page
- **Page Title**: Write a Review
- **Overview**: A page for users to write reviews for purchased books.
- **Elements**:
  - **ID: write-review-page** - Type: Div - Container for the write review page.
  - **ID: select-book** - Type: Dropdown - Dropdown to select book to review.
  - **ID: rating-select** - Type: Dropdown - Dropdown to select rating (1-5 stars).
  - **ID: review-text** - Type: Textarea - Field to write review text.
  - **ID: submit-review-button** - Type: Button - Button to submit review.

### 9. Bestsellers Page
- **Page Title**: Bestsellers
- **Overview**: A page displaying top-selling books ranked by sales.
- **Elements**:
  - **ID: bestsellers-page** - Type: Div - Container for the bestsellers page.
  - **ID: bestsellers-list** - Type: Div - Ranked list of bestselling books with rank, title, author, and sales count.
  - **ID: time-period-filter** - Type: Dropdown - Dropdown to filter by time period (This Week, This Month, All Time).
  - **ID: view-book-button-{book_id}** - Type: Button - Button to view book details (each bestseller has this).
  - **ID: back-to-dashboard** - Type: Button - Button to navigate back to dashboard.

## 4. Data Storage

The 'BookstoreOnline' application will store data locally in text files organized in the directory 'data'. The following data formats and examples are defined:

### 1. Books Data
- **File Name**: `books.txt`
- **Data Format**:
  ```
  book_id|title|author|isbn|category|price|stock|description
  ```
- **Example Data**:
  ```
  1|The Great Gatsby|F. Scott Fitzgerald|9780743273565|Fiction|12.99|50|A classic American novel
  2|Sapiens|Yuval Noah Harari|9780062316097|Non-Fiction|16.99|30|A brief history of humankind
  3|1984|George Orwell|9780451524935|Fiction|14.99|45|Dystopian social science fiction
  ```

### 2. Categories Data
- **File Name**: `categories.txt`
- **Data Format**:
  ```
  category_id|category_name|description
  ```
- **Example Data**:
  ```
  1|Fiction|Fictional narratives and novels
  2|Non-Fiction|Factual and educational books
  3|Science|Scientific topics and research
  ```

### 3. Cart Data
- **File Name**: `cart.txt`
- **Data Format**:
  ```
  cart_id|book_id|quantity|added_date
  ```
- **Example Data**:
  ```
  1|1|2|2025-01-15
  2|3|1|2025-01-16
  ```

### 4. Orders Data
- **File Name**: `orders.txt`
- **Data Format**:
  ```
  order_id|customer_name|order_date|total_amount|status|shipping_address
  ```
- **Example Data**:
  ```
  1|John Doe|2025-01-10|38.97|Delivered|123 Main St, New York, NY 10001
  2|Jane Smith|2025-01-14|16.99|Shipped|456 Oak Ave, Los Angeles, CA 90001
  ```

### 5. Order Items Data
- **File Name**: `order_items.txt`
- **Data Format**:
  ```
  order_item_id|order_id|book_id|quantity|price
  ```
- **Example Data**:
  ```
  1|1|1|2|12.99
  2|1|3|1|14.99
  3|2|2|1|16.99
  ```

### 6. Reviews Data
- **File Name**: `reviews.txt`
- **Data Format**:
  ```
  review_id|book_id|customer_name|rating|review_text|review_date
  ```
- **Example Data**:
  ```
  1|1|Alice Johnson|5|Amazing book! A true classic.|2025-01-12
  2|2|Bob Williams|4|Very informative and well-written.|2025-01-13
  3|3|Charlie Brown|5|Thought-provoking and relevant today.|2025-01-15
  ```

### 7. Bestsellers Data
- **File Name**: `bestsellers.txt`
- **Data Format**:
  ```
  book_id|sales_count|period
  ```
- **Example Data**:
  ```
  2|150|This Month
  1|120|This Month
  3|95|This Month
  ```

   Tool: write_text_file({"filename":"design_spec.md","content":"# BookstoreOnline - Design Specification Document\n\n---\n\n## Section 1: Flask Routes Specification\n\n### 1. Root Route\n- **Route Path:** `/`\n- **Function Name:** `root_redirect`\n- **HTTP Method:** GET\n- **Template Rendered:** Redirect to `/dashboard`\n- **Context Variables:** None\n- **Description:** Redirects the user to the Dashboard page.\n\n\n### 2. Dashboard Page\n- **Route Path:** `/dashboard`\n- **Function Name:** `dashboard`\n- **HTTP Method:** GET\n- **Template Rendered:** `dashboard.html`\n- **Context Variables:**\n  - `featured_books` (list of dict): List of featured book data dictionaries.\n  - `bestsellers` (list of dict): List of bestseller books data dictionaries.\n\n\n### 3. Book Catalog Page\n- **Route Path:** `/catalog`\n- **Function Name:** `book_catalog`\n- **HTTP Method:** GET\n- **Template Rendered:** `catalog.html`\n- **Context Variables:**\n  - `books` (list of dict): List of available books filtered by search and category.\n  - `categories` (list of dict): List of categories for filtering.\n  - `selected_category` (str): The category filter selected by the user.\n  - `search_query` (str): Search string entered by the user.\n\n\n### 4. Book Details Page\n- **Route Path:** `/book/<int:book_id>`\n- **Function Name:** `book_details`\n- **HTTP Method:** GET\n- **Template Rendered:** `book_details.html`\n- **Context Variables:**\n  - `book` (dict): Detailed information of the selected book.\n  - `reviews` (list of dict): Customer reviews for the book.\n\n- **Route Path (Add To Cart POST):** `/book/<int:book_id>/add_to_cart`\n- **Function Name:** `add_to_cart`\n- **HTTP Method:** POST\n- **Template Rendered:** Redirect to `/book/<int:book_id>`\n- **Form Handling:** Handles adding the selected book to the shopping cart. Quantity assumed to be 1 by default.\n\n\n### 5. Shopping Cart Page\n- **Route Path:** `/cart`\n- **Function Name:** `cart`\n- **HTTP Method:** GET\n- **Template Rendered:** `cart.html`\n- **Context Variables:**\n  - `cart_items` (list of dict): Items currently in the shopping cart.\n  - `total_amount` (float): Total cost of all items in the cart.\n\n- **Route Path (Update Quantity POST):** `/cart/update_quantity/<int:item_id>`\n- **Function Name:** `update_quantity`\n- **HTTP Method:** POST\n- **Template Rendered:** Redirect to `/cart`\n- **Form Handling:** Updates the quantity for a specific cart item.\n\n- **Route Path (Remove Item POST):** `/cart/remove_item/<int:item_id>`\n- **Function Name:** `remove_item`\n- **HTTP Method:** POST\n- **Template Rendered:** Redirect to `/cart`\n- **Form Handling:** Removes an item from the cart.\n\n\n### 6. Checkout Page\n- **Route Path (GET):** `/checkout`\n- **Function Name:** `checkout`\n- **HTTP Method:** GET\n- **Template Rendered:** `checkout.html`\n- **Context Variables:** None\n\n- **Route Path (POST - Place Order):** `/checkout/place_order`\n- **Function Name:** `place_order`\n- **HTTP Method:** POST\n- **Template Rendered:** Redirect to `/orders`\n- **Form Handling:** Processes the checkout form, creates order record, clears the cart.\n\n\n### 7. Order History Page\n- **Route Path:** `/orders`\n- **Function Name:** `order_history`\n- **HTTP Method:** GET\n- **Template Rendered:** `orders.html`\n- **Context Variables:**\n  - `orders` (list of dict): List of user orders with ID, date, total, and status.\n  - `status_filter` (str): The status filter applied (All, Pending, Shipped, Delivered).\n\n- **Route Path (View Order Details GET):** `/orders/<int:order_id>`\n- **Function Name:** `view_order`\n- **HTTP Method:** GET\n- **Template Rendered:** *Note: Order detail page not specified in user task, implementation optional.*\n- **Context Variables:**\n  - `order` (dict): Selected order details.\n  - `order_items` (list of dict): Items in the selected order.\n\n\n### 8. Reviews Page\n- **Route Path:** `/reviews`\n- **Function Name:** `reviews_page`\n- **HTTP Method:** GET\n- **Template Rendered:** `reviews.html`\n- **Context Variables:**\n  - `reviews` (list of dict): List of customer reviews.\n  - `rating_filter` (str): Current rating filter applied.\n\n\n### 9. Write Review Page\n- **Route Path (GET):** `/write_review`\n- **Function Name:** `write_review_page`\n- **HTTP Method:** GET\n- **Template Rendered:** `write_review.html`\n- **Context Variables:**\n  - `books` (list of dict): Books eligible for review.\n\n- **Route Path (POST):** `/write_review/submit`\n- **Function Name:** `submit_review`\n- **HTTP Method:** POST\n- **Template Rendered:** Redirect to `/reviews`\n- **Form Handling:** Processes review submission form fields: book selected, rating, and review text.\n\n\n### 10. Bestsellers Page\n- **Route Path:** `/bestsellers`\n- **Function Name:** `bestsellers_page`\n- **HTTP Method:** GET\n- **Template Rendered:** `bestsellers.html`\n- **Context Variables:**\n  - `bestsellers` (list of dict): Ranked list of bestselling books.\n  - `time_period` (str): Selected time period filter (This Week, This Month, All Time).\n\n---\n\n## Section 2: HTML Templates Specification\n\n### Template 1: Dashboard Page\n- **File:** `templates/dashboard.html`\n- **Page Title:** Bookstore Dashboard\n- **Main <h1> Heading:** Bookstore Dashboard\n- **Element IDs and Purpose:**\n  - `dashboard-page` (Div) - Container for entire dashboard page.\n  - `featured-books` (Div) - Displays featured book recommendations.\n  - `browse-catalog-button` (Button) - Navigates to Catalog page.\n  - `view-cart-button` (Button) - Navigates to Shopping Cart page.\n  - `bestsellers-button` (Button) - Navigates to Bestsellers page.\n- **Context Variables:**\n  - `featured_books` (list of dict)\n  - `bestsellers` (list of dict)\n- **Navigation:**\n  - Buttons use `url_for`:\n    - `browse-catalog-button` -> `url_for('book_catalog')`\n    - `view-cart-button` -> `url_for('cart')`\n    - `bestsellers-button` -> `url_for('bestsellers_page')`\n\n\n### Template 2: Book Catalog Page\n- **File:** `templates/catalog.html`\n- **Page Title:** Book Catalog\n- **Main <h1> Heading:** Book Catalog\n- **Element IDs and Purpose:**\n  - `catalog-page` (Div) - Container for catalog page.\n  - `search-input` (Input) - Search field to enter query by title, author, ISBN.\n  - `category-filter` (Dropdown) - Select book category filter.\n  - `selected_category` (str)\n  - `search_query` (str)\n- **Navigation:**\n  - `view-book-button-{book_id}` button links to `url_for('book_details', book_id=book_id)`\n\n\n### Template 3: Book Details Page\n- **File:** `templates/book_details.html`\n- **Page Title:** Book Details\n- **Main <h1> Heading:** Book Details\n- **Element IDs and Purpose:**\n  - `book-details-page` (Div) - Container for book details page.\n  - `book-title` (H1) - Displays the book title.\n  - `book-author` (Div) - Displays the book author.\n  - `book-price` (Div) - Displays book price.\n  - `add-to-cart-button` (Button) - Button to add book to cart.\n  - `book-reviews` (Div) - Shows customer reviews for the book.\n- **Context Variables:**\n  - `book` (dict)\n  - `reviews` (list of dict)\n- **Form Structure:**\n  - `remove-item-button-{item_id}` (Button) - Button to remove item from cart.\n  - `proceed-checkout-button` (Button) - Button to proceed to checkout.\n  - `total-amount` (Div) - Displays total cart amount.\n- **Context Variables:**\n  - `cart_items` (list of dict)\n  - `total_amount` (float)\n- **Navigation:**\n  - `proceed-checkout-button` -> `url_for('checkout')`\n- **Form Structure:**\n  - POST forms for update quantity and remove item actions.\n\n\n### Template 5: Checkout Page\n- **File:** `templates/checkout.html`\n- **Page Title:** Checkout\n- **Main <h1> Heading:** Checkout\n- **Element IDs and Purpose:**\n  - `checkout-page` (Div) - Container for checkout page.\n  - `customer-name` (Input) - Field for entering customer name.\n  - `shipping-address` (Textarea) - Field for entering shipping address.\n  - `payment-method` (Dropdown) - `order-status-filter` (Dropdown) - Dropdown to filter orders by status.\n  - `back-to-dashboard` (Button) - Button to return to dashboard.\n- **Context Variables:**\n  - `orders` (list of dict)\n  - `status_filter` (str)\n- **Navigation:**\n  - `view-order-button-{order_id}` -> `url_for('view_order', order_id=order_id)`\n  - `back-to-dashboard` -> `url_for('dashboard')`\n\n\n### Template 7: Reviews Page\n- **File:** `templates/reviews.html`\n- **Page Title:** Customer Reviews\n- **Main <h1> Heading:** Customer Reviews\n- **Element IDs and Purpose:**\n  - `bestsellers` (list of dict)\n  - `time_period` (str)\n- **Navigation:**\n  - `view-book-button-{book_id}` -> `url_for('book_details', book_id=book_id)`\n  - `back-to-dashboard` -> `url_for('dashboard')`\n\n---\n\n## Section 3: Data Schemas Specification\n\n### 1. Books Data\n- **File:** `data/books.txt`\n- **Format:** Pipe-delimited (`|`)\n- **Fields Order:**\n  1. `book_id` (int)\n  2. `title` (str)\n  3. `author` (str)\n  4. `isbn` (str)\n  5. `category` (str)\n  6. `price` (float)\n  7. `stock` (int)\n  8. `description` (str)\n- **Description:** Stores all book records with details.\n- **Example Data:**\n  ```\n  1|The Great Gatsby|F. Scott Fitzgerald|9780743273565|Fiction|12.99|50|A classic American novel\n  2|Sapiens|Yuval Noah Harari|9780062316097|Non-Fiction|16.99|30|A brief history of humankind\n  3|1984|George Orwell|9780451524935|Fiction|14.99|45|Dystopian social science fiction\n  ```\n\n\n### 2. Categories Data\n- **File:** `data/categories.txt`\n- **Format:** Pipe-delimited (`|`)\n- **Fields Order:**\n  1. `category_id` (int)\n  2. `category_name` (str)\n  3. `description` (str)\n- **Description:** Stores categories of books with descriptions.\n- **Example Data:**\n  ```\n  1|Fiction|Fictional narratives and novels\n  2|Non-Fiction|Factual and educational books\n  3|Science|Scientific topics and research\n  ```\n\n\n### 3. Cart Data\n- **File:** `data/cart.txt`\n- **Format:** Pipe-delimited (`|`)\n- **Fields Order:**\n  1. `cart_id` (int)\n  2. `book_id` (int)\n  3. `quantity` (int)\n  4. `added_date` (str, yyyy-mm-dd)\n- **Description:** Stores shopping cart items and quantity.\n- **Example Data:**\n  ```\n  1|1|2|2025-01-15\n  2|3|1|2025-01-16\n  ```\n\n\n### 4. Orders Data\n- **File:** `data/orders.txt`\n- **Format:** Pipe-delimited (`|`)\n- **Fields Order:**\n  1. `order_id` (int)\n  2. `customer_name` (str)\n  3. `order_date` (str, yyyy-mm-dd)\n  4. `total_amount` (float)\n  5. `status` (str)\n  6. `shipping_address` (str)\n- **Description:** Stores orders placed by customers.\n- **Example Data:**\n  ```\n  1|John Doe|2025-01-10|38.97|Delivered|123 Main St, New York, NY 10001\n  2|Jane Smith|2025-01-14|16.99|Shipped|456 Oak Ave, Los Angeles, CA 90001\n  ```\n\n\n### 5. Order Items Data\n- **File:** `data/order_items.txt`\n- **Format:** Pipe-delimited (`|`)\n- **Fields Order:**\n  1. `order_item_id` (int)\n  2. `order_id` (int)\n  3. `book_id` (int)\n  4. `quantity` (int)\n  5. `price` (float)\n- **Description:** Stores items associated with each order.\n- **Example Data:**\n  ```\n  1|1|1|2|12.99\n  2|1|3|1|14.99\n  3|2|2|1|16.99\n  ```\n\n\n### 6. Reviews Data\n- **File:** `data/reviews.txt`\n- **Format:** Pipe-delimited (`|`)\n- **Fields Order:**\n  1. `review_id` (int)\n  2. `book_id` (int)\n  3. `customer_name` (str)\n  4. `rating` (int, 1-5)\n  5. `review_text` (str)\n  6. `review_date` (str, yyyy-mm-dd)\n- **Description:** Stores customer reviews for books.\n- **Example Data:**\n  ```\n  1|1|Alice Johnson|5|Amazing book! A true classic.|2025-01-12\n  2|2|Bob Williams|4|Very informative and well-written.|2025-01-13\n  3|3|Charlie Brown|5|Thought-provoking and relevant today.|2025-01-15\n  ```\n\n\n### 7. Bestsellers Data\n- **File:** `data/bestsellers.txt`\n- **Format:** Pipe-delimited (`|`)\n- **Fields Order:**\n  1. `book_id` (int)\n  2. `sales_count` (int)\n  3. `period` (str) - Example values: This Week, This Month, All Time\n- **Description:** Stores bestsellers ranking data per time period.\n- **Example Data:**\n  ```\n  2|150|This Month\n  1|120|This Month\n  3|95|This Month\n  ```\n\n---\n\n**End of Design Specification Document**\n"})

  [user_task_description] # Requirements Document for 'BookstoreOnline' Web Application  ## 1. Objective Develop a comprehensive web application named 'BookstoreOnline' using Python, with data managed through local text files. The application enables users to browse books, add items to cart, checkout, write reviews, and track order history. No authentication required - all features are directly accessible. Note that the website should start from the Dashboard page.  ## 2. Language The required development language for the 'BookstoreOnline' application is Python.  ## 3. Page Design  The 'BookstoreOnline' web application will consist of the following nine pages:  ### 1. Dashboard Page - **Page Title**: Bookstore Dashboard - **Overview**: The main hub displaying featured books, bestsellers, and quick navigation to all functionalities. - **Elements**:   - **ID: dashboard-page** - Type: Div - Container for the dashboard page.   - **ID: featured-books** - Type: Div - Display of featured book recommendations.   - **ID: browse-catalog-button** - Type: Button - Button to navigate to book catalog page.   - **ID: view-cart-button** - Type: Button - Button to navigate to shopping cart page.   - **ID: bestsellers-button** - Type: Button - Button to navigate to bestsellers page.  ### 2. Book Catalog Page - **Page Title**: Book Catalog - **Overview**: A page displaying all available books with search and filter capabilities. - **Elements**:   - **ID: catalog-page** - Type: Div - Container for the catalog page.   - **ID: search-input** - Type: Input - Field to search books by title, author, or ISBN.   - **ID: category-filter** - Type: Dropdown - Dropdown to filter by category (Fiction, Non-Fiction, Science, History, etc.).   - **ID: books-grid** - Type: Div - Grid displaying book cards with cover, title, author, and price.   - **ID: view-book-button-{book_id}** - Type: Button - Button to view book details (each book card has this).  ### 3. Book Details Page - **Page Title**: Book Details - **Overview**: A page displaying detailed information about a specific book. - **Elements**:   - **ID: book-details-page** - Type: Div - Container for the book details page.   - **ID: book-title** - Type: H1 - Display book title.   - **ID: book-author** - Type: Div - Display book author.   - **ID: book-price** - Type: Div - Display book price.   - **ID: add-to-cart-button** - Type: Button - Button to add book to shopping cart.   - **ID: book-reviews** - Type: Div - Section displaying customer reviews.  ### 4. Shopping Cart Page - **Page Title**: Shopping Cart - **Overview**: A page displaying items in the cart with quantity management and checkout option. - **Elements**:   - **ID: cart-page** - Type: Div - Container for the cart page.   - **ID: cart-items-table** - Type: Table - Table displaying cart items with title, quantity, price, and subtotal.   - **ID: update-quantity-{item_id}** - Type: Input (number) - Field to update item quantity (each cart item has this).   - **ID: remove-item-button-{item_id}** - Type: Button - Button to remove item from cart (each cart item has this).   - **ID: proceed-checkout-button** - Type: Button - Button to proceed to checkout.   - **ID: total-amount** - Type: Div - Display total cart amount.  ### 5. Checkout Page - **Page Title**: Checkout - **Overview**: A page for users to enter shipping information and complete purchase. - **Elements**:   - **ID: checkout-page** - Type: Div - Container for the checkout page.   - **ID: customer-name** - Type: Input - Field to input customer name.   - **ID: shipping-address** - Type: Textarea - Field to input shipping address.   - **ID: payment-method** - Type: Dropdown - Dropdown to select payment method (Credit Card, PayPal, Bank Transfer).   - **ID: place-order-button** - Type: Button - Button to confirm and place order.  ### 6. Order History Page - **Page Title**: Order History - **Overview**: A page displaying all previous orders with tracking information. - **Elements**:   - **ID: orders-page** - Type: Div - Container for the orders page.   - **ID: orders-table** - Type: Table - Table displaying orders with order ID, date, total amount, and status.   - **ID: view-order-button-{order_id}** - Type: Button - Button to view order details (each order has this).   - **ID: order-status-filter** - Type: Dropdown - Dropdown to filter by status (All, Pending, Shipped, Delivered).   - **ID: back-to-dashboard** - Type: Button - Button to navigate back to dashboard.  ### 7. Reviews Page - **Page Title**: Customer Reviews - **Overview**: A page displaying all customer reviews and allowing users to write new reviews. - **Elements**:   - **ID: reviews-page** - Type: Div - Container for the reviews page.   - **ID: reviews-list** - Type: Div - List of all reviews with book title, rating, and review text.   - **ID: write-review-button** - Type: Button - Button to navigate to write review page.   - **ID: filter-by-rating** - Type: Dropdown - Dropdown to filter reviews by rating (All, 5 stars, 4 stars, etc.).   - **ID: back-to-dashboard** - Type: Button - Button to navigate back to dashboard.  ### 8. Write Review Page - **Page Title**: Write a Review - **Overview**: A page for users to write reviews for purchased books. - **Elements**:   - **ID: write-review-page** - Type: Div - Container for the write review page.   - **ID: select-book** - Type: Dropdown - Dropdown to select book to review.   - **ID: rating-select** - Type: Dropdown - Dropdown to select rating (1-5 stars).   - **ID: review-text** - Type: Textarea - Field to write review text.   - **ID: submit-review-button** - Type: Button - Button to submit review.  ### 9. Bestsellers Page - **Page Title**: Bestsellers - **Overview**: A page displaying top-selling books ranked by sales. - **Elements**:   - **ID: bestsellers-page** - Type: Div - Container for the bestsellers page.   - **ID: bestsellers-list** - Type: Div - Ranked list of bestselling books with rank, title, author, and sales count.   - **ID: time-period-filter** - Type: Dropdown - Dropdown to filter by time period (This Week, This Month, All Time).   - **ID: view-book-button-{book_id}** - Type: Button - Button to view book details (each bestseller has this).   - **ID: back-to-dashboard** - Type: Button - Button to navigate back to dashboard.  ## 4. Data Storage  The 'BookstoreOnline' application will store data locally in text files organized in the directory 'data'. The following data formats and examples are defined:  ### 1. Books Data - **File Name**: `books.txt` - **Data Format**:   ```   book_id|title|author|isbn|category|price|stock|description   ``` - **Example Data**:   ```   1|The Great Gatsby|F. Scott Fitzgerald|9780743273565|Fiction|12.99|50|A classic American novel   2|Sapiens|Yuval Noah Harari|9780062316097|Non-Fiction|16.99|30|A brief history of humankind   3|1984|George Orwell|9780451524935|Fiction|14.99|45|Dystopian social science fiction   ```  ### 2. Categories Data - **File Name**: `categories.txt` - **Data Format**:   ```   category_id|category_name|description   ``` - **Example Data**:   ```   1|Fiction|Fictional narratives and novels   2|Non-Fiction|Factual and educational books   3|Science|Scientific topics and research   ```  ### 3. Cart Data - **File Name**: `cart.txt` - **Data Format**:   ```   cart_id|book_id|quantity|added_date   ``` - **Example Data**:   ```   1|1|2|2025-01-15   2|3|1|2025-01-16   ```  ### 4. Orders Data - **File Name**: `orders.txt` - **Data Format**:   ```   order_id|customer_name|order_date|total_amount|status|shipping_address   ``` - **Example Data**:   ```   1|John Doe|2025-01-10|38.97|Delivered|123 Main St, New York, NY 10001   2|Jane Smith|2025-01-14|16.99|Shipped|456 Oak Ave, Los Angeles, CA 90001   ```  ### 5. Order Items Data - **File Name**: `order_items.txt` - **Data Format**:   ```   order_item_id|order_id|book_id|quantity|price   ``` - **Example Data**:   ```   1|1|1|2|12.99   2|1|3|1|14.99   3|2|2|1|16.99   ```  ### 6. Reviews Data - **File Name**: `reviews.txt` - **Data Format**:   ```   review_id|book_id|customer_name|rating|review_text|review_date   ``` - **Example Data**:   ```   1|1|Alice Johnson|5|Amazing book! A true classic.|2025-01-12   2|2|Bob Williams|4|Very informative and well-written.|2025-01-13   3|3|Charlie Brown|5|Thought-provoking and relevant today.|2025-01-15   ```  ### 7. Bestsellers Data - **File Name**: `bestsellers.txt` - **Data Format**:   ```   book_id|sales_count|period   ``` - **Example Data**:   ```   2|150|This Month   1|120|This Month   3|95|This Month   ```

Root Route\n- **Route Path:** `/`\n- **Function Name:** `root_redirect`\n- **HTTP Method:** GET\n- **Template Rendered:** Redirect to `/dashboard`\n- **Context Variables:** None\n- **Description:** Redirects users from root URL to the Dashboard page.\n\n\n### 2. Dashboard Page\n- **Route Path:** `/dashboard`\n- **Function Name:** `dashboard`\n- **HTTP Method:** GET\n- **Template Rendered:** `dashboard.html`\n- **Context Variables:**\n  - `featured_books` (list of dict): List of featured book information.\n  - `bestsellers` (list of dict): List of bestselling book information.\n\n\n### 3. Book Catalog Page\n- **Route Path:** `/catalog`\n- **Function Name:** `book_catalog`\n- **HTTP Method:** GET\n- **Template Rendered:** `catalog.html`\n- **Context Variables:**\n  - `books` (list of dict): List of all available books filtered by search and category.\n  - `categories` (list of dict): List of all categories for filtering.\n  - `selected_category` (str): Selected category filter.\n  - `search_query` (str): Current search query.\n\n\n### 4. Book Details Page\n- **Route Path:** `/book/<int:book_id>`\n- **Function Name:** `book_details`\n- **HTTP Method:** GET\n- **Template Rendered:** `book_details.html`\n- **Context Variables:**\n  - `book` (dict): Detailed information about the selected book.\n  - `reviews` (list of dict): List of customer reviews for the book.\n\n- **Route Path (POST Add to Cart):** `/book/<int:book_id>/add_to_cart`\n- **Function Name:** `add_to_cart`\n- **HTTP Method:** POST\n- **Template Rendered:** Redirect back to `/book/<int:book_id>`\n- **Form Handling:** Handles adding the book to the shopping cart. Quantity assumed 1 if not specified.\n\n\n### 5. Shopping Cart Page\n- **Route Path:** `/cart`\n- **Function Name:** `cart`\n- **HTTP Method:** GET\n- **Template Rendered:** `cart.html`\n- **Context Variables:**\n  - `cart_items` (list of dict): List of items currently in cart including book details and quantity.\n  - `total_amount` (float): Total price for all items in the cart.\n\n- **Route Path (POST Update Quantity):** `/cart/update_quantity/<int:item_id>`\n- **Function Name:** `update_quantity`\n- **HTTP Method:** POST\n- **Template Rendered:** Redirect to `/cart`\n- **Form Handling:** Handles update of quantity for a specific cart item.\n\n- **Route Path (POST Remove Item):** `/cart/remove_item/<int:item_id>`\n- **Function Name:** `remove_item`\n- **HTTP Method:** POST\n- **Template Rendered:** Redirect to `/cart`\n- **Form Handling:** Handles removal of an item from the cart.\n\n\n### 6. Checkout Page\n- **Route Path (GET):** `/checkout`\n- **Function Name:** `checkout`\n- **HTTP Method:** GET\n- **Template Rendered:** `checkout.html`\n- **Context Variables:** None\n\n- **Route Path (POST Place Order):** `/checkout/place_order`\n- **Function Name:** `place_order`\n- **HTTP Method:** POST\n- **Template Rendered:** Redirect to `/orders`\n- **Form Handling:** Processes order placement, reads customer name, shipping address, payment method, creates the order and clears the cart.\n\n\n### 7. Order History Page\n- **Route Path:** `/orders`\n- **Function Name:** `order_history`\n- **HTTP Method:** GET\n- **Template Rendered:** `orders.html`\n- **Context Variables:**\n  - `orders` (list of dict): List of orders with order ID, date, total amount, and status.\n  - `status_filter` (str): Current filter status (e.g., All, Pending, Shipped, Delivered).\n\n- **Route Path (View Order Details GET):** `/orders/<int:order_id>`\n- **Function Name:** `view_order`\n- **HTTP Method:** GET\n- **Template Rendered:** *Not explicitly specified, but expected: possible `order_details.html`*\n- **Context Variables:**\n  - `order` (dict): Information about the selected order.\n  - `order_items` (list of dict): List of items within the order.\n\n\n### 8. Reviews Page\n- **Route Path:** `/reviews`\n- **Function Name:** `reviews_page`\n- **HTTP Method:** GET\n- **Template Rendered:** `reviews.html`\n- **Context Variables:**\n  - `reviews` (list of dict): List of customer reviews.\n  - `rating_filter` (str): Rating filter to apply (e.g., All, 5 stars).\n\n\n### 9. Write Review Page\n- **Route Path (GET):** `/write_review`\n- **Function Name:** `write_review_page`\n- **HTTP Method:** GET\n- **Template Rendered:** `write_review.html`\n- **Context Variables:**\n  - `books` (list of dict): Books eligible for review.\n\n- **Route Path (POST Submit Review):** `/write_review/submit`\n- **Function Name:** `submit_review`\n- **HTTP Method:** POST\n- **Template Rendered:** Redirect to `/reviews`\n- **Form Handling:** Accepts submitted review data including selected book, rating (1-5), and review text.\n\n\n### 10. Bestsellers Page\n- **Route Path:** `/bestsellers`\n- **Function Name:** `bestsellers_page`\n- **HTTP Method:** GET\n- **Template Rendered:** `bestsellers.html`\n- **Context Variables:**\n  - `bestsellers` (list of dict): Ranked bestsellers with book info and sales count.\n  - `time_period` (str): Selected filter for time period (This Week, This Month, All Time).\n\n---\n\n## Section 2: HTML Templates Specification\n\n### Dashboard Page\n- **File Path:** `templates/dashboard.html`\n- **Page Title:** Bookstore Dashboard\n- **Main Heading (`<h1>`):** Bookstore Dashboard\n- **Element IDs:**\n  - `bestsellers-button` (Button): Navigates to Bestsellers page.\n- **Context Variables:**\n  - `featured_books` (list of dict)\n  - `bestsellers` (list of dict)\n- **Navigation Button Mappings (using `url_for`):**\n  - `view-book-button-{book_id}` (Button): Button to view details of each book.\n- **Context Variables:**\n  - `books` (list of dict)\n  - `categories` (list of dict)\n  - `selected_category` (str)\n  - `search_query` (str)\n- **Navigation Button Mappings:**\n  - `book-reviews` (Div): Displays reviews of this book.\n- **Context Variables:**\n  - `book` (dict)\n  - `reviews` (list of dict)\n- **Form Structure:**\n  - Form method POST to `/book/<book_id>/add_to_cart`\n  - `proceed-checkout-button` (Button): Navigates to checkout page.\n  - `total-amount` (Div): Shows total price.\n- **Context Variables:**\n  - `cart_items` (list of dict)\n  - `total_amount` (float)\n- **Navigation Button Mappings:**\n  - `place-order-button` (Button): Submit order button.\n- **Context Variables:** None\n- **Form Structure:**\n  - POST form to `/checkout/place_order`\n  - Form fields: `customer-name`, `shipping-address`, `payment-method`\n  - Submit button ID: `place-order-button`\n\n\n### Order History Page\n- **File Path:** `templates/orders.html`\n- **Page Title:** Order History\n- **Main Heading (`<h1>`):** Order History\n- **Element IDs:**\n  - `back-to-dashboard` (Button): Returns to dashboard.\n- **Context Variables:**\n  - `orders` (list of dict)\n  - `status_filter` (str)\n- **Navigation Button Mappings:**\n  - `view-order-button-{order_id}` → `url_for('view_order', order_id=order_id)`\n  - `back-to-dashboard` → `url_for('dashboard')`\n\n\n### Reviews Page\n- **File Path:** `templates/reviews.html`\n- **Page Title:** Customer Reviews\n- **Main Heading (`<h1>`):** Customer Reviews\n- **Element IDs:**\n  - `reviews-page` (Div): Container.\n  - `reviews-list` (Div): Lists reviews including book title, rating, and text.\n  - `write-review-button` (Button): Button to navigate write review page.\n  - `filter-by-rating` (Dropdown): Filter reviews by rating.\n  - `back-to-dashboard` (Button): Returns to dashboard.\n- **Context Variables:**\n  - `reviews` (list of dict)\n  - `rating_filter` (str)\n- **Navigation Button Mappings:**\n  - `write-review-button` → `url_for('write_review_page')`\n  - `back-to-dashboard` → `url_for('dashboard')`\n\n\n### Write Review Page\n- **File Path:** `templates/write_review.html`\n- **Page Title:** Write a Review\n- **Main Heading (`<h1>`):** Write a Review\n- **Element IDs:**\n  - `submit-review-button` (Button): Submit review button.\n- **Context Variables:**\n  - `books` (list of dict)\n- **Form Structure:**\n  - POST form to `/write_review/submit`\n  - Form fields: `select-book`, `rating-select`, `review-text`\n  - Submit button ID: `submit-review-button`\n\n\n### Bestsellers Page\n- **File Path:** `templates/bestsellers.html`\n- **Page Title:** Bestsellers\n- **Main Heading (`<h1>`):** Bestsellers\n- **Element IDs:**\n  - `back-to-dashboard` (Button): Returns to dashboard.\n- **Context Variables:**\n  - `bestsellers` (list of dict)\n  - `time_period` (str)\n- **Navigation Button Mappings:**\n  - `view-book-button-{book_id}` → `url_for('book_details', book_id=book_id)`\n  - `back-to-dashboard` → `url_for('dashboard')`\n\n---\n\n## Section 3: Data Schemas Specification\n\n### 1. Books Data\n- **File Path:** `data/books.txt`\n- **Format:** Pipe-delimited (`|`)\n- **Fields Order:**\n  1. `book_id` (int)\n  2. `title` (str)\n  3. `author` (str)\n  4. `isbn` (str)\n  5. `category` (str)\n  6. `price` (float)\n  7. `stock` (int)\n  8. `description` (str)\n- **Description:** Stores all book records.\n- **Example Rows:**\n  ```\n  1|The Great Gatsby|F. Scott Fitzgerald|9780743273565|Fiction|12.99|50|A classic American novel\n  2|Sapiens|Yuval Noah Harari|9780062316097|Non-Fiction|16.99|30|A brief history of humankind\n  3|1984|George Orwell|9780451524935|Fiction|14.99|45|Dystopian social science fiction\n  ```\n\n\n### 2. Categories Data\n- **File Path:** `data/categories.txt`\n- **Format:** Pipe-delimited (`|`)\n- **Fields Order:**\n  1. `category_id` (int)\n  2. `category_name` (str)\n  3. `description` (str)\n- **Description:** Stores book categories.\n- **Example Rows:**\n  ```\n  1|Fiction|Fictional narratives and novels\n  2|Non-Fiction|Factual and educational books\n  3|Science|Scientific topics and research\n  ```\n\n\n### 3. Cart Data\n- **File Path:** `data/cart.txt`\n- **Format:** Pipe-delimited (`|`)\n- **Fields Order:**\n  1. `cart_id` (int)\n  2. `book_id` (int)\n  3. `quantity` (int)\n  4. `added_date` (str in YYYY-MM-DD format)\n- **Description:** Stores shopping cart items.\n- **Example Rows:**\n  ```\n  1|1|2|2025-01-15\n  2|3|1|2025-01-16\n  ```\n\n\n### 4. Orders Data\n- **File Path:** `data/orders.txt`\n- **Format:** Pipe-delimited (`|`)\n- **Fields Order:**\n  1. `order_id` (int)\n  2. `customer_name` (str)\n  3. `order_date` (str in YYYY-MM-DD format)\n  4. `total_amount` (float)\n  5. `status` (str)\n  6. `shipping_address` (str)\n- **Description:** Stores orders with customer and shipping information.\n- **Example Rows:**\n  ```\n  1|John Doe|2025-01-10|38.97|Delivered|123 Main St, New York, NY 10001\n  2|Jane Smith|2025-01-14|16.99|Shipped|456 Oak Ave, Los Angeles, CA 90001\n  ```\n\n\n### 5. Order Items Data\n- **File Path:** `data/order_items.txt`\n- **Format:** Pipe-delimited (`|`)\n- **Fields Order:**\n  1. `order_item_id` (int)\n  2. `order_id` (int)\n  3. `book_id` (int)\n  4. `quantity` (int)\n  5. `price` (float)\n- **Description:** Stores individual items for each order.\n- **Example Rows:**\n  ```\n  1|1|1|2|12.99\n  2|1|3|1|14.99\n  3|2|2|1|16.99\n  ```\n\n\n### 6. Reviews Data\n- **File Path:** `data/reviews.txt`\n- **Format:** Pipe-delimited (`|`)\n- **Fields Order:**\n  1. `review_id` (int)\n  2. `book_id` (int)\n  3. `customer_name` (str)\n  4. `rating` (int 1-5)\n  5. `review_text` (str)\n  6. `review_date` (str in YYYY-MM-DD format)\n- **Description:** Stores customer reviews for books.\n- **Example Rows:**\n  ```\n  1|1|Alice Johnson|5|Amazing book! A true classic.|2025-01-12\n  2|2|Bob Williams|4|Very informative and well-written.|2025-01-13\n  3|3|Charlie Brown|5|Thought-provoking and relevant today.|2025-01-15\n  ```\n\n\n### 7. Bestsellers Data\n- **File Path:** `data/bestsellers.txt`\n- **Format:** Pipe-delimited (`|`)\n- **Fields Order:**\n  1. `book_id` (int)\n  2. `sales_count` (int)\n  3. `period` (str)\n- **Description:** Stores bestseller book sales counts by period.\n- **Example Rows:**\n  ```\n  2|150|This Month\n  1|120|This Month\n  3|95|This Month\n  ```\n\n---\n\n**End of Design Specification Document**\n"})

`cart_items` (list of dict): Cart items with book details and quantity.\n  - `total_amount` (float): Total cost.\n\n- **Route Path:** `/cart/update_quantity/<int:item_id>`\n- **Function Name:** `update_quantity`\n- **HTTP Method:** POST\n- **Template Rendered:** Redirect to `/cart`\n- **Form Handling:** Updates quantity of a cart item.\n\n- **Route Path:** `/cart/remove_item/<int:item_id>`\n- **Function Name:** `remove_item`\n- **HTTP Method:** POST\n- **Template Rendered:** Redirect to `/cart`\n- **Form Handling:** Removes an item from cart.\n\n\n### Checkout Page\n- **Route Path:** `/checkout`\n- **Function Name:** `checkout`\n- **HTTP Method:** GET\n- **Template Rendered:** `checkout.html`\n- **Context Variables:** None\n\n- **Route Path:** `/checkout/place_order`\n- **Function Name:** `place_order`\n- **HTTP Method:** POST\n- **Template Rendered:** Redirect to `/orders`\n- **Form Handling:** Processes order placement from form data including customer name, shipping address, payment method.\n\n\n### Order History Page\n- **Route Path:** `/orders`\n- **Function Name:** `order_history`\n- **HTTP Method:** GET\n- **Template Rendered:** `orders.html`\n- **Context Variables:**\n  - `orders` (list of dict): User order history.\n  - `status_filter` (str): Order status filter.\n\n- **Route Path:** `/orders/<int:order_id>`\n- **Function Name:** `view_order`\n- **HTTP Method:** GET\n- **Template Rendered:** *Not specified in detail (optional)*\n- **Context Variables:**\n  - `order` (dict): Information on selected order.\n  - `order_items` (list of dict): Items in the order.\n\n\n### Reviews Page\n- **Route Path:** `/reviews`\n- **Function Name:** `reviews_page`\n- **HTTP Method:** GET\n- **Template Rendered:** `reviews.html`\n- **Context Variables:**\n  - `reviews` (list of dict): All reviews.\n  - `rating_filter` (str): Currently selected rating for filtering.\n\n\n### Write Review Page\n- **Route Path:** `/write_review`\n- **Function Name:** `write_review_page`\n- **HTTP Method:** GET\n- **Template Rendered:** `write_review.html`\n- **Context Variables:**\n  - `books` (list of dict): Books user can review.\n\n- **Route Path:** `/write_review/submit`\n- **Function Name:** `submit_review`\n- **HTTP Method:** POST\n- **Template Rendered:** Redirect to `/reviews`\n- **Form Handling:** Accept book_id, rating, review text.\n\n\n### Bestsellers Page\n- **Route Path:** `/bestsellers`\n- **Function Name:** `bestsellers_page`\n- **HTTP Method:** GET\n- **Template Rendered:** `bestsellers.html`\n- **Context Variables:**\n  - `bestsellers` (list of dict): List of bestselling books ranked.\n  - `time_period` (str): Selected filter for time period (This Week, This Month, All Time).\n\n---\n\n## Section 2: HTML Templates Specification\n\n### Dashboard Page\n- **File Path:** `templates/dashboard.html`\n- **Page Title:** Bookstore Dashboard\n- **Main Heading (<h1>):** Bookstore Dashboard\n- **Element IDs:**\n  - `dashboard-page`: Div container for page.\n  - `featured-books`: Div displaying featured books.\n  - `browse-catalog-button`: Button navigating to `/catalog`.\n  - `view-cart-button`: Button navigating to `/cart`.\n  - `bestsellers-button`: Button navigating to `/bestsellers`.\n- **Context Variables:** `featured_books`, `bestsellers`\n- **Navigation Button mappings:**\n  - `browse-catalog-button`: `url_for('book_catalog')`\n  - `view-cart-button`: `url_for('cart')`\n  - `bestsellers-button`: `url_for('bestsellers_page')`\n\n\n### Book Catalog Page\n- **File Path:** `templates/catalog.html`\n- **Page Title:** Book Catalog\n- **Main Heading (<h1>):** Book Catalog\n- **Element IDs:**\n  - `catalog-page`: Div container.\n  - `search-input`: Input for search queries.\n  - `category-filter`: Dropdown for category filter.\n  - `books-grid`: Div grid for book cards.\n  - `view-book-button-{book_id}`: Button to view individual book details.\n- **Context Variables:** `books`, `categories`, `selected_category`, `search_query`\n- **Navigation Button mappings:**\n  - `view-book-button-{book_id}`: `url_for('book_details', book_id=book_id)`\n\n\n### Book Details Page\n- **File Path:** `templates/book_details.html`\n- **Page Title:** Book Details\n- **Main Heading (<h1>):** Book Details\n- **Element IDs:**\n  - `book-details-page`: Div container.\n  - `book-title`: H1 showing book title.\n  - `book-author`: Div showing author.\n  - `book-price`: Div showing price.\n  - `add-to-cart-button`: Button to add book to cart.\n  - `book-reviews`: Div showing reviews.\n- **Context Variables:** `book`, `reviews`\n- **Form Structure:** POST form to `/book/<book_id>/add_to_cart` with submit button (`add-to-cart-button`), quantity assumed 1.\n\n\n### Shopping Cart Page\n- **File Path:** `templates/cart.html`\n- **Page Title:** Shopping Cart\n- **Main Heading (<h1>):** Shopping Cart\n- **Element IDs:**\n  - `cart-page`: Div container.\n  - `cart-items-table`: Table listing cart items.\n  - `update-quantity-{item_id}`: Number input for quantity update.\n  - `remove-item-button-{item_id}`: Button to remove item.\n  - `proceed-checkout-button`: Button navigating to `/checkout`.\n  - `total-amount`: Div showing total cost.\n- **Context Variables:** `cart_items`, `total_amount`\n- **Navigation Button mappings:**\n  - `proceed-checkout-button`: `url_for('checkout')`\n- **Form Structure:** POST forms for updating and removing items.\n\n\n### Checkout Page\n- **File Path:** `templates/checkout.html`\n- **Page Title:** Checkout\n- **Main Heading (<h1>):** Checkout\n- **Element IDs:**\n  - `checkout-page`: Div container.\n  - `customer-name`: Input field.\n  - `shipping-address`: Textarea.\n  - `payment-method`: Dropdown.\n  - `place-order-button`: Button for submitting order.\n- **Context Variables:** None\n- **Form Structure:** POST form to `/checkout/place_order` with fields: `customer-name`, `shipping-address`, `payment-method`, submit button ID `place-order-button`.\n\n\n### Order History Page\n- **File Path:** `templates/orders.html`\n- **Page Title:** Order History\n- **Main Heading (<h1>):** Order History\n- **Element IDs:**\n  - `orders-page`: Container div.\n  - `orders-table`: Table showing orders.\n  - `view-order-button-{order_id}`: Button to view order details.\n  - `order-status-filter`: Dropdown to filter by status.\n  - `back-to-dashboard`: Button to navigate back to dashboard.\n- **Context Variables:** `orders`, `status_filter`\n- **Navigation Button mappings:**\n  - `view-order-button-{order_id}`: `url_for('view_order', order_id=order_id)`\n  - `back-to-dashboard`: `url_for('dashboard')`\n\n\n### Reviews Page\n- **File Path:** `templates/reviews.html`\n- **Page Title:** Customer Reviews\n- **Main Heading (<h1>):** Customer Reviews\n- **Element IDs:**\n  - `reviews-page`: Div container.\n  - `reviews-list`: Div containing all reviews.\n  - `write-review-button`: Button navigating to Write Review.\n  - `filter-by-rating`: Dropdown for rating filter.\n  - `back-to-dashboard`: Button to dashboard.\n- **Context Variables:** `reviews`, `rating_filter`\n- **Navigation Button mappings:**\n  - `write-review-button`: `url_for('write_review_page')`\n  - `back-to-dashboard`: `url_for('dashboard')`\n\n\n### Write Review Page\n- **File Path:** `templates/write_review.html`\n- **Page Title:** Write a Review\n- **Main Heading (<h1>):** Write a Review\n- **Element IDs:**\n  - `write-review-page`: Div container.\n  - `select-book`: Dropdown to select book.\n  - `rating-select`: Dropdown to select rating.\n  - `review-text`: Textarea for review text.\n  - `submit-review-button`: Button to submit review.\n- **Context Variables:** `books`\n- **Form Structure:** POST form to `/write_review/submit` with fields: `select-book`, `rating-select`, `review-text`, submit button `submit-review-button`.\n\n\n### Bestsellers Page\n- **File Path:** `templates/bestsellers.html`\n- **Page Title:** Bestsellers\n- **Main Heading (<h1>):** Bestsellers\n- **Element IDs:**\n  - `bestsellers-page`: Div container.\n  - `bestsellers-list`: Div listing bestselling books.\n  - `time-period-filter`: Dropdown for filtering time period.\n  - `view-book-button-{book_id}`: Button to book details.\n  - `back-to-dashboard`: Button to dashboard.\n- **Context Variables:** `bestsellers`, `time_period`\n- **Navigation Button mappings:**\n  - `view-book-button-{book_id}`: `url_for('book_details', book_id=book_id)`\n  - `back-to-dashboard`: `url_for('dashboard')`\n\n---\n\n## Section 3: Data Schemas Specification\n\n### Books Data\n- **File:** `data/books.txt`\n- **Format:** Pipe-separated (`|`)\n- **Fields:**\n  1. `book_id` (int)\n  2. `title` (str)\n  3. `author` (str)\n  4. `isbn` (str)\n  5. `category` (str)\n  6. `price` (float)\n  7. `stock` (int)\n  8. `description` (str)\n- **Purpose:** Stores book information.\n- **Example Rows:**\n  ```\n  1|The Great Gatsby|F. Scott Fitzgerald|9780743273565|Fiction|12.99|50|A classic American novel\n  2|Sapiens|Yuval Noah Harari|9780062316097|Non-Fiction|16.99|30|A brief history of humankind\n  3|1984|George Orwell|9780451524935|Fiction|14.99|45|Dystopian social science fiction\n  ```\n\n\n### Categories Data\n- **File:** `data/categories.txt`\n- **Format:** Pipe-separated (`|`)\n- **Fields:**\n  1. `category_id` (int)\n  2. `category_name` (str)\n  3. `description` (str)\n- **Purpose:** Stores category information.\n- **Example Rows:**\n  ```\n  1|Fiction|Fictional narratives and novels\n  2|Non-Fiction|Factual and educational books\n  3|Science|Scientific topics and research\n  ```\n\n\n### Cart Data\n- **File:** `data/cart.txt`\n- **Format:** Pipe-separated (`|`)\n- **Fields:**\n  1. `cart_id` (int)\n  2. `book_id` (int)\n  3. `quantity` (int)\n  4. `added_date` (str, YYYY-MM-DD)\n- **Purpose:** Stores cart items.\n- **Example Rows:**\n  ```\n  1|1|2|2025-01-15\n  2|3|1|2025-01-16\n  ```\n\n\n### Orders Data\n- **File:** `data/orders.txt`\n- **Format:** Pipe-separated (`|`)\n- **Fields:**\n  1. `order_id` (int)\n  2. `customer_name` (str)\n  3. `order_date` (str, YYYY-MM-DD)\n  4. `total_amount` (float)\n  5. `status` (str)\n  6. `shipping_address` (str)\n- **Purpose:** Stores order info.\n- **Example Rows:**\n  ```\n  1|John Doe|2025-01-10|38.97|Delivered|123 Main St, New York, NY 10001\n  2|Jane Smith|2025-01-14|16.99|Shipped|456 Oak Ave, Los Angeles, CA 90001\n  ```\n\n\n### Order Items Data\n- **File:** `data/order_items.txt`\n- **Format:** Pipe-separated (`|`)\n- **Fields:**\n  1. `order_item_id` (int)\n  2. `order_id` (int)\n  3. `book_id` (int)\n  4. `quantity` (int)\n  5. `price` (float)\n- **Purpose:** Stores order line items.\n- **Example Rows:**\n  ```\n  1|1|1|2|12.99\n  2|1|3|1|14.99\n  3|2|2|1|16.99\n  ```\n\n\n### Reviews Data\n- **File:** `data/reviews.txt`\n- **Format:** Pipe-separated (`|`)\n- **Fields:**\n  1. `review_id` (int)\n  2. `book_id` (int)\n  3. `customer_name` (str)\n  4. `rating` (int, 1-5)\n  5. `review_text` (str)\n  6. `review_date` (str, YYYY-MM-DD)\n- **Purpose:** Stores book reviews.\n- **Example Rows:**\n  ```\n  1|1|Alice Johnson|5|Amazing book! A true classic.|2025-01-12\n  2|2|Bob Williams|4|Very informative and well-written.|2025-01-13\n  3|3|Charlie Brown|5|Thought-provoking and relevant today.|2025-01-15\n  ```\n\n\n### Bestsellers Data\n- **File:** `data/bestsellers.txt`\n- **Format:** Pipe-separated (`|`)\n- **Fields:**\n  1. `book_id` (int)\n  2. `sales_count` (int)\n  3. `period` (str)\n- **Purpose:** Stores bestseller sales data by period.\n- **Example Rows:**\n  ```\n  2|150|This Month\n  1|120|This Month\n  3|95|This Month\n  ```\n\n---\n\n**End of Design Specification Document**\n"})

**Navigation Button mappings:**   - `view-book-button-{book_id}`: `url_for('book_details', book_id=book_id)`   ### Book Details Page - **File Path:** `templates/book_details.html` - **Page Title:** Book Details - `add-to-cart-button`: Button to add book to cart.   - `book-reviews`: Div showing reviews. - **Context Variables:** `book`, `reviews` - **Form Structure:** POST form to `/book/<book_id>/add_to_cart` with submit button (`add-to-cart-button`), quantity assumed 1.   ### Shopping Cart Page - **File Path:** `templates/cart.html` - **Page Title:** Shopping Cart - **Main Heading (<h1>):** Shopping Cart - **Element IDs:**   - `cart-page`: Div container.   - `cart-items-table`: Table listing cart items.   - `update-quantity-{item_id}`: Number input for quantity update.   - `remove-item-button-{item_id}`: Button to remove item.   - `proceed-checkout-button`: Button navigating to `/checkout`.   - `total-amount`: Div showing total cost. - Scott Fitzgerald|9780743273565|Fiction|12.99|50|A classic American novel   2|Sapiens|Yuval Noah Harari|9780062316097|Non-Fiction|16.99|30|A brief history of humankind   3|1984|George Orwell|9780451524935|Fiction|14.99|45|Dystopian social science fiction   ```   ### Categories Data - **Example Rows:**   ```   1|Fiction|Fictional narratives and novels   2|Non-Fiction|Factual and educational books   3|Science|Scientific topics and research   ```   ### Cart Data - **File:** `data/cart.txt` - **Format:** Pipe-separated (`|`) - **Fields:**   1. `cart_id` (int)   2. `book_id` (int)   3. `quantity` (int)   4. `added_date` (str, YYYY-MM-DD) - **Purpose:** Stores cart items. - **Example Rows:**   ```   1|1|2|2025-01-15   2|3|1|2025-01-16   ```   ### Orders Data - **Purpose:** Stores order info. - **Example Rows:**   ```   1|John Doe|2025-01-10|38.97|Delivered|123 Main St, New York, NY 10001   2|Jane Smith|2025-01-14|16.99|Shipped|456 Oak Ave, Los Angeles, CA 90001   ```   ### Order Items Data - **Example Rows:**   ```   1|1|1|2|12.99   2|1|3|1|14.99   3|2|2|1|16.99   ```   ### Reviews Data - **File:** `data/reviews.txt` - **Format:** Pipe-separated (`|`) - **Fields:**   1. `review_id` (int)   2. `book_id` (int)   3. `customer_name` (str)   4. `rating` (int, 1-5)   5. `review_text` (str)   6. `review_date` (str, YYYY-MM-DD) -
